{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eternal Scale
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10891
|idx=102
|description=They say, pay-to-win always makes you feel good! So if keep paying eternally, you will feel good for good? No one has the answer. But at least, this scale can show you a taste of eternity...
|skill=
|hp=1880
|def=357
|atk=275
|rush=250
|gene1=Water DMG +120
|gene2=Water RES +120
|gene3=Water DMG +120
|gene4=DMG REDUC +4%
|gene5=Chance of Weakening Enemy +4%
|gene6=DMG REDUC +4%
|gene7=Chance of Weakening Enemy +4% (Awakened)
|}}
